name: AI Translate API
description: AI-powered translation supporting 40+ languages, language detection, and batch translation. Built on Cloudflare Workers AI with M2M100 model.
long_description:
## Overview

AI-powered translation API supporting 40+ languages with automatic language detection and batch translation. Built on Cloudflare Workers AI using Meta's M2M100-1.2B model. A fast, free alternative to DeepL and Google Translate APIs.

## Key Features

- ✅ 40+ languages including EN, ES, FR, DE, JA, ZH, KO, AR, HI
- ✅ Automatic language detection powered by Llama 3.1
- ✅ Batch translation of up to 10 texts per request
- ✅ ISO 639-1 language codes for easy integration
- ✅ Ultra-low latency via Cloudflare's global edge network

## Use Cases

- **App Localization**: Translate UI strings and content for multilingual apps
- **Customer Support**: Auto-translate incoming tickets and replies
- **E-commerce**: Translate product listings for international markets
- **Content Marketing**: Localize blog posts and marketing copy
- **Chat Applications**: Real-time message translation in multilingual groups

## Quick Start

```
POST /translate
Content-Type: application/json

{"text": "Hello, how are you?", "source_lang": "en", "target_lang": "es"}
```

Returns `{"translated_text": "Hola, ¿cómo estás?", "source_lang": "en", "target_lang": "es"}`.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 2,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier supports all 40+ languages. No credit card required.

parameters.name: source_lang
parameters.description: Source language code (ISO 639-1, e.g., en, es, ja)
